Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to be followed by any rejection activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment in successful variants versus variants that include a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR when the previous activity is Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases where no rejections occurred
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR compared to elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that loop back due to prior rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time until Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR is performed in traces that previously experienced Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rejected versus approved paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that originate from a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'
